code: import React from'react';import{formatCurrency}from'../utils';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const BudgetList=_ref=>{let{budgets,onDelete}=_ref;if(!budgets.length){return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"empty-state",children:"Create a budget to start receiving spending alerts."});}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("ul",{className:"budget-list",children:budgets.map(budget=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("li",{className:"budget-item",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"budget-meta",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{fontWeight:700},children:budget.category}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{color:'var(--text-muted)',marginTop:6},children:budget.month})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"button",className:"button-danger",onClick:()=>onDelete(budget._id),children:"Delete"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{display:'flex',justifyContent:'space-between',marginBottom:10},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{children:[formatCurrency(budget.spent||0)," spent"]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{children:[formatCurrency(budget.amount)," budget"]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:`progress ${budget.status||'healthy'}`,children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{style:{width:`${Math.min(budget.percentage||0,100)}%`}})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{color:'var(--text-muted)',marginTop:10},children:[budget.percentage||0,"% used, ",formatCurrency(budget.remaining||budget.amount)," remaining"]})]},`${budget.month}-${budget.category}`))});};export default BudgetList;
